layer_1_flower.intent: Tropical comfort like warm sand between your toes

layer_2_essential_oil.blend_rationale: Tea Tree carries the dominant terpinolene. Black Pepper matches the banana aroma note. Lemongrass provides Myrcene support. Sage rounds the blend with a soft finish.

layer_3_music.spotify_prompt: A low-energy session. Tropical comfort like warm sand between your toes. Genres: ambient, dub, lo-fi hip hop, deep house. Tempo around 65-90 BPM.

layer_4_tea.name: Sand Tea
layer_4_tea.description: Banana and pineapple gum infused chamomile blend
method: Heat 8 oz filtered water to 185°F.
Add chamomile tea bag and steep for 5 minutes.
Add dried banana chip and let infuse for 1 minute.
Add pineapple sage leaf and let infuse for 1 minute.
Strain into a warm teacup.
Stir in honey and serve.

mocktail.name: Sand Fizz
method: Fill a rocks glass with large ice cubes.
Combine 2 oz banana syrup and 0.75 oz fresh lemon juice in a shaker with ice.
Add 0.5 oz fresh pineapple juice.
Shake for 8 seconds.
Strain into glass over fresh ice.
Top with 2 oz sparkling water and stir gently.
Garnish with banana.

cocktail.name: Sand Sour
cocktail.description: Bourbon-based banana and pineapple gum cocktail
method: Combine 2 oz bourbon, 1.5 oz banana syrup, and 0.75 oz fresh lemon juice in a shaker.
Add 0.5 oz fresh pineapple juice.
Dry shake for 5 seconds (if using egg white).
Add ice and shake for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with banana.

juice.name: Sand Juice
method: Press 2 cups fresh banana through a cold press.
Press 1 cup pineapple through the press.
Add 0.5 inch fresh ginger root to the press.
Combine all juices in a glass.
Add 0.5 oz raw honey and stir until dissolved.
Pour over ice and serve immediately.

wellness_shot.name: Sand Shot
method: Chill a shot glass in the freezer for 2 minutes.
In a mixing glass, combine 1 oz bourbon with 0.75 oz fresh banana juice.
Add 0.25 oz fresh lemon juice.
Stir with ice for 5 seconds.
Strain into the chilled shot glass and serve immediately.

snack.name: Medjool Dates Stuffed with Goat Cheese
snack.desc: Plump dates filled with herbed chèvre and topped with a walnut half and honey drizzle.

appetizer.name: Wild Mushroom Toast with Thyme
appetizer.desc: Sautéed mixed mushrooms on sourdough with fresh thyme and shaved Parmesan.

main.name: Lamb Tagine with Preserved Lemon
main.desc: Slow-braised lamb with apricots, olives, preserved lemon, and warming spices.

dessert.name: Cardamom Rice Pudding
dessert.desc: Creamy arborio rice pudding with cardamom, rosewater, and crushed pistachios.

cheese.name: Manchego & Membrillo
cheese.desc: Aged Manchego with quince paste, Marcona almonds, and crusty bread.

bath_bomb.base: baking soda, citric acid, cornstarch, Epsom salt
bath_bomb.extras: dried flower petals, oat milk powder

shower_steamer.activation: Place on shower floor away from direct stream. Steam activates essential oils for 5-10 minutes of aromatherapy.

layer_10_incense.burn_method: Place on heat-resistant surface in a ventilated room. Allow 30 seconds for the flame to establish before extinguishing to a smolder.
layer_10_incense.ritual_suggestion: Light before the session begins. Let the smoke settle the room while you prepare your tropical space.

layer_11_environment.spatial_setup: Low seating, soft throws, candles at eye level. Minimize overhead lighting.
layer_11_environment.scent_anchor: Essential oil blend via diffuser, started 30 minutes before session

layer_12_breathwork.timing: Begin with the diffuser. Complete all cycles before consumption.
layer_12_breathwork.guidance_text: Close your eyes. Breathe in through the nose for four counts, letting the scent fill your lungs. Hold gently for four. Release slowly through the mouth for eight counts, feeling gravity pull you deeper into your seat with each exhale.

layer_13_narrative.text:
19 drops of tea tree carry the dominant Terpinolene through the room slowly — the way Whitethorn Valley Farm intended when they cultivated Sand Castle in Whitethorn, Humboldt County. The lineage reads Banana Pie X Papaya Bomb, but what arrives in the glass is something that transcends parentage: banana, pineapple gum, and hibiscus.

The second oil — Black Pepper — adds 10 drops of brightness that matches the pineapple gum note in the flower itself. Comforting is not a command here but an invitation, the way the best strains suggest rather than insist. The body settles into stress relieving with the kind of molecular precision that only terpenes at 1.86% total can deliver.

In the dimly lit room, the essential oil blend has been working for thirty minutes before the flower arrives. The pre-load creates a terpene environment that the cannabis completes rather than initiates — your olfactory system already tuned to the frequency of Terpinolene, already primed for tropical comfort like warm sand between your toes. The third oil adds depth. The fourth oil rounds everything into a finish that feels inevitable rather than constructed.

This is what Whitethorn Valley Farm grows in Whitethorn, Humboldt County: not just cannabis, but context. The indica genetics express through terpenes that speak the same chemical language as bay laurel on a Humboldt hillside. The session settles into its final form — joyful, unhurried, complete — and the 4 oils that started it are now indistinguishable from the flower that finished it.

layer_14_location.terpene_walk: Begin at Mount Tamalpais State Park, diffuse essential oil blend 30 minutes before arrival. Walk slowly, breathing deeply through the nose to layer forest phytoncides over the pre-loaded terpene profile.

wine.terpene_bridge: Gewürztraminer carries terpinolene-adjacent aromatics — lychee, rose, and allspice that mirror the fresh, herbal quality.
Riesling's terpene-rich profile carries floral and citrus compounds that harmonize with terpinolene's bright complexity.
wine.tasting_note: White peach, lime blossom, slate minerality

beer.terpene_bridge: Saaz hops carry terpinolene, and saison yeast produces spicy, herbal phenolics that amplify the terpene's complexity.
Noble hops carry terpinolene in their essential oil profile — clean, herbal, slightly floral.

layer_15_wine_beer.cannabaceae_note: Cannabis and hops (Humulus lupulus) are botanical cousins in the family Cannabaceae, sharing terpene synthesis pathways that produce identical aromatic molecules.
